description_long: This is a large, multi-story office building with a distinctive curved and angular footprint, featuring a combination of straight and rounded facades. The exterior is clad in a beige or tan material, with extensive horizontal window bands running along the main elevations, separated by vertical structural elements. One side of the building displays a prominent glass atrium or stairwell with a geometric, radial pattern, while another side features a rounded corner with a grid of small square windows. The central section of the building is decorated with abstract, multicolored mural-like panels, adding visual interest and breaking up the massing. The roof appears flat and is partially covered with patterned surfaces, possibly for aesthetic or functional purposes. The overall design is modern, with a focus on geometric forms and a mix of solid and transparent elements.
description: A modern, multi-story office building with curved and angular facades, horizontal window bands, and abstract mural panels. Features a glass atrium and a rounded corner with a grid of windows.
description_view_0: The building's main facade is visible, showing horizontal window bands, a curved corner, and a prominent glass atrium with a radial pattern.
description_view_1: This view highlights the abstract mural panels in the central section and the rounded corner with a grid of small windows.
description_view_2: The rear of the building is visible, with fewer windows and more solid wall surfaces, as well as the continuation of the rounded corner.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the main facade is shown, emphasizing the horizontal window bands and the building's overall curved shape.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular horizontal bands of rectangular windows, with a grid of small square windows on the rounded corner and a radial glass pattern on the atrium.
